name: roc-mobile
description: Capacitor wrapper that packages the Rise of Civilizations web client into native iOS + Android apps.

scripts.apk: node build-mobile.mjs && cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: node build-mobile.mjs && cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.bundle:release: node build-mobile.mjs && cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
